title: What Photos Should I Include?
metaDescription: Selling your car? Discover exactly what photos should I include to attract more buyers on BuyAndScrap.com. Our guide helps you showcase your vehicle best.
content:
Selling your car on BuyAndScrap.com? Great photos are key to attracting serious buyers and getting a good price. You want your vehicle to stand out, and a comprehensive set of images does just that. So, the common question is, **what photos should I include** to make an impact? Let's break it down.

## The Essentials: Exterior Shots

Show off all your car's best angles!

### All Four Angles
Take clear shots of each side: front-three-quarter, side profile, and rear-three-quarter views. This gives buyers a full perspective of its shape.

### Front & Rear Details
Don’t forget close-ups of the front grille, headlights, and the rear lights and boot lid. These details help identify the model and check for damage.

### Wheels & Tyres
Picture each wheel, showing alloy condition and tyre tread. This indicates maintenance.

## Interior Matters

The inside of a car is just as important as the outside.

### Dashboard & Steering Wheel
A clear shot of the dashboard, showing mileage, infotainment, and control condition, is crucial. The steering wheel is a high-contact area, so show its condition too.

### Front & Rear Seats
Take separate photos of the front and rear seats. Highlight upholstery, look for rips, and show off features like leather or heated seats.

### Boot Space
A picture of the open boot demonstrates practical capacity. Include the parcel shelf if applicable.

## Showcasing Key Features & Condition

Certain details influence buyer decisions. This is where you really consider **what photos should I include** to build trust.

### Service History & Mileage
If you have a full-service history, photograph the stamped service book. A clear shot of the odometer showing current mileage is vital.

### Engine Bay
A clean engine bay, even a quick wipe-down, shows you care for your car. A quick snap reassures buyers of good maintenance.

### Any Imperfections
Honesty is best. If there’s a minor scratch or dent, take a clear photo. Buyers appreciate transparency and it prevents issues later.

## General Photography Tips for Success

*   **Clean Your Car**: Inside and out, a sparkling car looks more appealing.
*   **Good Lighting**: Natural daylight is best. Avoid harsh direct sunlight.
*   **Clear Background**: Park somewhere without distractions.
*   **Take Plenty**: Aim for 10-20 high-quality images to give a full picture.

Ultimately, when considering **what photos should I include**, aim for a comprehensive visual story that answers potential buyer questions. Now you know **what photos should I include** to get your car noticed on BuyAndScrap.com!
